# OnToolsAI

> AI-powered customer message writing tool built for trade businesses. OnToolsAI writes quote follow-ups, invoice reminders, review requests, running-late messages, complaint responses, and more — in seconds — for cleaning, HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, roofing, electrical, and painting businesses. Used by 200+ trade business owners across Australia, New Zealand, and the UK. Free to start. No account required.

## About

OnToolsAI is the only AI message writing tool built exclusively for trade businesses. Traditional AI writing tools produce generic output that doesn't sound like a tradie — OnToolsAI knows the difference between a roofing follow-up and a cleaning invoice reminder, and writes accordingly. Every message is trade-specific, tone-matched, and ready to copy and send via SMS, WhatsApp, or email. The app includes a free job calendar and smart follow-up nudge engine that reminds business owners when to chase quotes, request reviews, and follow up on unpaid invoices.

Site: https://ontoolsai.com
Contact: hello@ontoolsai.com
App: https://ontoolsai.com/app
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Plans

- Free: 10 messages/month, all trades, watermark on output
- Pro ($5.99/month): Unlimited messages, no watermark, full 3-message sequences
- Business ($17.99/month): Everything in Pro + Brand Voice (writes in the user's own style)

## App

- [OnToolsAI App — Write a message now](https://ontoolsai.com/app): The main application. No account or sign-up required to use free tier. Supports 7 trades, 21 message tools, SMS/WhatsApp/email channels, Friendly/Professional/Firm tone selection, message history, job calendar, and smart follow-up nudges.

## Trade Communication Guides

Comprehensive guides covering every communication scenario for each trade — quote follow-ups, review requests, invoice reminders, complaint responses, running late messages, and more.

- [Trade Communication Toolkit — Master Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/trade-communication-toolkit.html): Complete reference covering all message types across all trades. The definitive resource for trade business communication.
- [Cleaning Business Communication Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/cleaning-communication-guide.html): Full communication guide for cleaning businesses — residential, commercial, end-of-tenancy, Airbnb turnovers.
- [HVAC Communication Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/hvac-communication-guide.html): Full communication guide for HVAC businesses — seasonal maintenance, emergency callouts, system installations.
- [Plumbing Communication Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/plumbing-communication-guide.html): Full communication guide for plumbing businesses — emergency repairs, installations, recurring maintenance.
- [Landscaping Communication Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/landscaping-communication-guide.html): Full communication guide for landscaping businesses — recurring maintenance, garden design, seasonal work.
- [Roofing Communication Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/roofing-communication-guide.html): Full communication guide for roofing businesses — re-roofs, repairs, storm damage, insurance jobs.
- [Electrical Communication Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/electrical-communication-guide.html): Full communication guide for electrical businesses — residential, commercial, compliance work.
- [Painting Communication Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/painting-communication-guide.html): Full communication guide for painting businesses — interior, exterior, colour consultation dynamics.

## Statistics & Data Pages (Linkable Assets)

Original data, benchmarks, and shareable diagrams for trade industries. These pages are designed to be cited and shared.

- [HVAC Industry Statistics & Benchmarks](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/hvac-statistics.html): HVAC system performance data, customer communication benchmarks, response rate statistics, and industry diagrams.
- [Cleaning Industry Statistics & Benchmarks](https://ontoolsai.com/guides/cleaning-statistics.html): Professional cleaning industry data, follow-up conversion rates, review request benchmarks, and shareable process diagrams.

## Keyword Gap Pages — Copy-Paste Templates by Trade

High-intent pages targeting the most searched trade communication queries. Each page includes free copy-paste templates, trade-specific advice, and FAQ content.

### HVAC Templates
- [HVAC Quote Follow-Up Text Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/hvac-follow-up-text-message.html): How and when to follow up on HVAC quotes — seasonal urgency, pre-summer and pre-winter angles.
- [HVAC Customer Review Request Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/hvac-customer-review-request.html): When and how to ask HVAC customers for Google reviews — timing relative to job completion.
- [HVAC Invoice Reminder Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/hvac-invoice-reminder-template.html): How to chase unpaid HVAC invoices professionally without damaging the relationship.
- [HVAC Running Late Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/hvac-running-late-message.html): What to say when an HVAC technician is delayed — dispatch-level messaging.

### Cleaning Templates
- [Cleaning Quote Follow-Up Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/cleaning-follow-up-quote.html): How to follow up on cleaning quotes — recurring vs one-off dynamics.
- [Cleaning Review Request Text Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/cleaning-review-request-text.html): How to ask cleaning customers for Google reviews — best timing and format.
- [Cleaning Invoice Reminder Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/cleaning-invoice-reminder.html): How to chase cleaning invoices — recurring customer relationship dynamics.
- [Cleaning Running Late Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/cleaning-running-late-message.html): What to tell cleaning customers when you're delayed.

### Plumbing Templates
- [Plumbing Quote Follow-Up Text Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/plumbing-follow-up-text-message.html): How to follow up on plumbing quotes — emergency vs planned job dynamics.
- [Plumbing Customer Review Request Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/plumbing-customer-review-request.html): How to ask plumbing customers for Google reviews after a job.
- [Plumbing Invoice Reminder Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/plumbing-invoice-reminder-template.html): How to chase plumbing invoices — including insurance and insurance-adjacent jobs.
- [Plumbing Running Late Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/plumbing-running-late-message.html): What to say when a plumber is delayed — emergency job overrun messaging.

### Electrical Templates
- [Electrical Quote Follow-Up Text Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/electrical-follow-up-text-message.html): How to follow up on electrical quotes — compliance job dynamics, commercial vs residential.
- [Electrical Customer Review Request Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/electrical-customer-review-request.html): How to ask electrical customers for Google reviews — trust-building in a high-compliance trade.
- [Electrical Invoice Reminder Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/electrical-invoice-reminder-template.html): How to chase electrical invoices — commercial account vs residential dynamics.
- [Electrical Running Late Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/electrical-running-late-message.html): What to tell electrical customers when you're running late.

### Landscaping Templates
- [Landscaping Quote Follow-Up Text Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/landscaping-follow-up-text-message.html): How to follow up on landscaping quotes — seasonal urgency, spring/autumn windows, recurring contract dynamics.
- [Landscaping Customer Review Request Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/landscaping-customer-review-request.html): How to ask landscaping customers for reviews — using the visual reveal moment.
- [Landscaping Invoice Reminder Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/landscaping-invoice-reminder-template.html): How to chase landscaping invoices — recurring maintenance relationship dynamics.
- [Landscaping Running Late Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/landscaping-running-late-message.html): What to tell landscaping customers when delayed — including weather cancellations.

### Roofing Templates
- [Roofing Quote Follow-Up Text Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/roofing-follow-up-text-message.html): How to follow up on roofing quotes — high-ticket decision dynamics, storm damage urgency, insurance jobs.
- [Roofing Customer Review Request Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/roofing-customer-review-request.html): How to ask roofing customers for Google reviews — timing around job completion and scaffold removal.
- [Roofing Invoice Reminder Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/roofing-invoice-reminder-template.html): How to chase roofing invoices — insurance claim delays, deposit structures.
- [Roofing Running Late Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/roofing-running-late-message.html): What to tell roofing customers when delayed — weather safety messaging.

### Painting Templates
- [Painting Quote Follow-Up Text Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/painting-follow-up-text-message.html): How to follow up on painting quotes — colour indecision as the #1 blocker, exterior weather windows.
- [Painting Customer Review Request Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/painting-customer-review-request.html): How to ask painting customers for reviews — using the reveal moment effectively.
- [Painting Invoice Reminder Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/painting-invoice-reminder-template.html): How to chase painting invoices — send on completion day while the positive feeling is fresh.
- [Painting Running Late Message Templates](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/painting-running-late-message.html): What to tell painting customers when delayed — acknowledging their room preparation.

## Cross-Trade Template Resources

- [Trade Business Review Request Templates — All Trades](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/trade-business-review-request-templates.html): Review request templates across all 7 trades in one place.
- [How to Follow Up on a Quote — Trade Business Guide](https://ontoolsai.com/tools/how-to-follow-up-on-a-quote.html): Universal guide to quote follow-up strategy for trade businesses.

## App Tool Pages (21 tools across 7 trades)

Individual tool landing pages for every message type across every trade. Each page links directly into the app with the trade and tool pre-selected.

## Crawling & Usage

This site welcomes indexing by AI crawlers, LLM training pipelines, RAG systems, and search engines. All content is original and trade-specific. robots.txt: https://ontoolsai.com/robots.txt — all crawlers permitted. Sitemap: https://ontoolsai.com/sitemap.xml
